---
name: Bug Report / 报告 Bug
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description / 描述

<!-- A clear and concise description of the bug. -->
<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你遇到的问题。 -->

## Steps to Reproduce / 复现步骤

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior / 预期行为

<!-- What did you expect to happen? -->
<!-- 你期望发生什么？ -->

## Actual Behavior / 实际结果

<!-- What actually happened instead? -->
<!-- 实际发生了什么？ -->

## Screenshots / 截图

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. -->
<!-- 如果可以，请附上截图来帮助描述问题。 -->

## Environment / 环境信息

- **App Version**: [e.g. 3.2.0]
- **Windows Version**: [e.g. Windows 11 24H2]
- **Installation Source**: [GitHub Release / Built from source]

## Save File (Optional) / 存档文件（可选）

<!-- If the bug is related to a specific save file, you can attach it or describe its characteristics. -->
<!-- 如果 Bug 与某个特定存档有关，可以附上存档文件或描述其特征。 -->

## Additional Context / 补充说明

<!-- Any other context about the problem. -->
<!-- 其他相关补充信息。 -->
